title: Bring back "See Billed Users" tab
excerpt: Bring back the “See Billed Users” tab under Administration > Users. It made it easy to see how many seats we own versus how many licenses are in use. Without it, I now have to filter out viewers & guests as well as inact…

posts.author: krasten (Kristen Harris)
posts.cookedHtml: Bring back the “See Billed Users” tab under Administration > Users. It made it easy to see how many seats we own versus how many licenses are in use. Without it, I now have to filter out viewers & guests as well as inactive & pending users. Seems counterintuitive for monday to make the process more difficult by adding steps.

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @krasten ,

If you go to the Administration tab → Billing, it will show you seats consumed vs total seats in the products tab.

Hope this helps!

posts.author: olivasmith (Oliva Smith)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

By reinstating this feature, you can eliminate the need for manual filtering of viewers, guests, inactive, and pending users.

Also solution by @kaylak is useful .

Thanks
